#  [Apache Flink 1.11.2 Released](</2020/09/17/apache-flink-1.11.2-released/>)

September 17, 2020 - Zhu Zhu [(@zhuzhv)](<https://twitter.com/zhuzhv>)

The Apache Flink community released the second bugfix version of the Apache Flink 1.11 series.

This release includes 96 fixes and minor improvements for Flink 1.11.1. The list below includes a detailed list of all fixes and improvements.

We highly recommend all users to upgrade to Flink 1.11.2.

Updated Maven dependencies:


    <dependency>
      <groupId>org.apache.flink</groupId>
      <artifactId>flink-java</artifactId>
      <version>1.11.2</version>
    </dependency>
    <dependency>
      <groupId>org.apache.flink</groupId>
      <artifactId>flink-streaming-java_2.11</artifactId>
      <version>1.11.2</version>
    </dependency>
    <dependency>
      <groupId>org.apache.flink</groupId>
      <artifactId>flink-clients_2.11</artifactId>
      <version>1.11.2</version>
    </dependency>


You can find the binaries on the updated [Downloads page](</downloads.html>).

List of resolved issues:

##  Sub-task

  * [[FLINK-16087](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-16087>)] - Translate "Detecting Patterns" page of "Streaming Concepts" into Chinese
  * [[FLINK-18264](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18264>)] - Translate the "External Resource Framework" page into Chinese
  * [[FLINK-18628](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18628>)] - Invalid error message for overloaded methods with same parameter name
  * [[FLINK-18801](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18801>)] - Add a "10 minutes to Table API" document under the "Python API" -> "User Guide" -> "Table API" section
  * [[FLINK-18910](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18910>)] - Create the new document structure for Python documentation according to FLIP-133
  * [[FLINK-18912](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18912>)] - Add a Table API tutorial link(linked to try-flink/python_table_api.md) under the "Python API" -> "GettingStart" -> "Tutorial" section
  * [[FLINK-18913](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18913>)] - Add a "TableEnvironment" document under the "Python API" -> "User Guide" -> "Table API" section
  * [[FLINK-18917](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18917>)] - Add a "Built-in Functions" link (linked to dev/table/functions/systemFunctions.md) under the "Python API" -> "User Guide" -> "Table API" section
  * [[FLINK-19110](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-19110>)] - Flatten current PyFlink documentation structure

##  Bug

  * [[FLINK-14087](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-14087>)] - throws java.lang.ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException when emiting the data using RebalancePartitioner.
  * [[FLINK-15467](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-15467>)] - Should wait for the end of the source thread during the Task cancellation
  * [[FLINK-16510](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-16510>)] - Task manager safeguard shutdown may not be reliable
  * [[FLINK-16827](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-16827>)] - StreamExecTemporalSort should require a distribution trait in StreamExecTemporalSortRule
  * [[FLINK-18081](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18081>)] - Fix broken links in "Kerberos Authentication Setup and Configuration" doc
  * [[FLINK-18212](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18212>)] - Init lookup join failed when use udf on lookup table
  * [[FLINK-18341](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18341>)] - Building Flink Walkthrough Table Java 0.1 COMPILATION ERROR
  * [[FLINK-18421](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18421>)] - Elasticsearch (v6.3.1) sink end-to-end test instable
  * [[FLINK-18468](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18468>)] - TaskExecutorITCase.testJobReExecutionAfterTaskExecutorTermination fails with DuplicateJobSubmissionException
  * [[FLINK-18552](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18552>)] - Update migration tests in master to cover migration from release-1.11
  * [[FLINK-18581](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18581>)] - Cannot find GC cleaner with java version previous jdk8u72(-b01)
  * [[FLINK-18588](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18588>)] - hive ddl create table should support 'if not exists'
  * [[FLINK-18595](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18595>)] - Deadlock during job shutdown
  * [[FLINK-18600](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18600>)] - Kerberized YARN per-job on Docker test failed to download JDK 8u251
  * [[FLINK-18608](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18608>)] - CustomizedConvertRule#convertCast drops nullability
  * [[FLINK-18612](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18612>)] - WordCount example failure when setting relative output path
  * [[FLINK-18632](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18632>)] - RowData's row kind do not assigned from input row data when sink code generate and physical type info is pojo type
  * [[FLINK-18639](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18639>)] - Error messages from BashJavaUtils are eaten
  * [[FLINK-18641](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18641>)] - "Failure to finalize checkpoint" error in MasterTriggerRestoreHook
  * [[FLINK-18646](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18646>)] - Managed memory released check can block RPC thread
  * [[FLINK-18650](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18650>)] - The description of dispatcher in Flink Architecture document is not accurate
  * [[FLINK-18655](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18655>)] - Set failOnUnableToExtractRepoInfo to false for git-commit-id-plugin in module flink-runtime
  * [[FLINK-18656](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18656>)] - Start Delay metric is always zero for unaligned checkpoints
  * [[FLINK-18659](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18659>)] - FileNotFoundException when writing Hive orc tables
  * [[FLINK-18663](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18663>)] - RestServerEndpoint may prevent server shutdown
  * [[FLINK-18665](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18665>)] - Filesystem connector should use TableSchema exclude computed columns
  * [[FLINK-18672](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18672>)] - Fix Scala code examples for UDF type inference annotations
  * [[FLINK-18677](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18677>)] - ZooKeeperLeaderRetrievalService does not invalidate leader in case of SUSPENDED connection
  * [[FLINK-18682](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18682>)] - Vector orc reader cannot read Hive 2.0.0 table
  * [[FLINK-18697](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18697>)] - Adding flink-table-api-java-bridge_2.11 to a Flink job kills the IDE logging
  * [[FLINK-18700](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18700>)] - Debezium-json format throws Exception when PG table's IDENTITY config is not FULL
  * [[FLINK-18705](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18705>)] - Debezium-JSON throws NPE when tombstone message is received
  * [[FLINK-18708](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18708>)] - The links of the connector sql jar of Kafka 0.10 and 0.11 are extinct
  * [[FLINK-18710](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18710>)] - ResourceProfileInfo is not serializable
  * [[FLINK-18748](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18748>)] - Savepoint would be queued unexpected if pendingCheckpoints less than maxConcurrentCheckpoints
  * [[FLINK-18749](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18749>)] - Correct dependencies in Kubernetes pom
  * [[FLINK-18750](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18750>)] - SqlValidatorException thrown when select from a view which contains a UDTF call
  * [[FLINK-18769](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18769>)] - MiniBatch doesn't work with FLIP-95 source
  * [[FLINK-18821](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18821>)] - Netty client retry mechanism may cause PartitionRequestClientFactory#createPartitionRequestClient to wait infinitely
  * [[FLINK-18832](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18832>)] - BoundedBlockingSubpartition does not work with StreamTask
  * [[FLINK-18856](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18856>)] - CheckpointCoordinator ignores checkpointing.min-pause
  * [[FLINK-18859](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18859>)] - ExecutionGraphNotEnoughResourceTest.testRestartWithSlotSharingAndNotEnoughResources failed with "Condition was not met in given timeout."
  * [[FLINK-18862](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18862>)] - Fix LISTAGG throws BinaryRawValueData cannot be cast to StringData exception in runtime
  * [[FLINK-18867](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18867>)] - Generic table stored in Hive catalog is incompatible between 1.10 and 1.11
  * [[FLINK-18900](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18900>)] - HiveCatalog should error out when listing partitions with an invalid spec
  * [[FLINK-18902](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18902>)] - Cannot serve results of asynchronous REST operations in per-job mode
  * [[FLINK-18941](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18941>)] - There are some typos in "Set up JobManager Memory"
  * [[FLINK-18942](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18942>)] - HiveTableSink shouldn't try to create BulkWriter factory when using MR writer
  * [[FLINK-18956](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18956>)] - StreamTask.invoke should catch Throwable instead of Exception
  * [[FLINK-18959](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18959>)] - Fail to archiveExecutionGraph because job is not finished when dispatcher close
  * [[FLINK-18992](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18992>)] - Table API renameColumns method annotation error
  * [[FLINK-18993](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18993>)] - Invoke sanityCheckTotalFlinkMemory method incorrectly in JobManagerFlinkMemoryUtils.java
  * [[FLINK-18994](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18994>)] - There is one typo in "Set up TaskManager Memory"
  * [[FLINK-19040](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-19040>)] - SourceOperator is not closing SourceReader
  * [[FLINK-19061](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-19061>)] - HiveCatalog fails to get partition column stats if partition value contains special characters
  * [[FLINK-19094](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-19094>)] - Revise the description of watermark strategy in Flink Table document
  * [[FLINK-19108](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-19108>)] - Stop expanding the identifiers with scope aliased by the system with 'EXPR$' prefix
  * [[FLINK-19109](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-19109>)] - Split Reader eats chained periodic watermarks
  * [[FLINK-19121](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-19121>)] - Avoid accessing HDFS frequently in HiveBulkWriterFactory
  * [[FLINK-19133](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-19133>)] - User provided kafka partitioners are not initialized correctly
  * [[FLINK-19148](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-19148>)] - Table crashed in Flink Table API & SQL Docs
  * [[FLINK-19166](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-19166>)] - StreamingFileWriter should register Listener before the initialization of buckets

##  Improvement

  * [[FLINK-16619](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-16619>)] - Misleading SlotManagerImpl logging for slot reports of unknown task manager
  * [[FLINK-17075](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-17075>)] - Add task status reconciliation between TM and JM
  * [[FLINK-17285](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-17285>)] - Translate "Python Table API" page into Chinese
  * [[FLINK-17503](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-17503>)] - Make memory configuration logging more user-friendly
  * [[FLINK-18598](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18598>)] - Add instructions for asynchronous execute in PyFlink doc
  * [[FLINK-18618](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18618>)] - Docker e2e tests are failing on CI
  * [[FLINK-18619](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18619>)] - Update training to use WatermarkStrategy
  * [[FLINK-18635](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18635>)] - Typo in 'concepts/timely stream processing' part of the website
  * [[FLINK-18643](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18643>)] - Migrate Jenkins jobs to ci-builds.apache.org
  * [[FLINK-18644](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18644>)] - Remove obsolete doc for hive connector
  * [[FLINK-18730](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18730>)] - Remove Beta tag from SQL Client docs
  * [[FLINK-18772](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18772>)] - Hide submit job web ui elements when running in per-job/application mode
  * [[FLINK-18793](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18793>)] - Fix Typo for api.common.eventtime.WatermarkStrategy Description
  * [[FLINK-18797](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18797>)] - docs and examples use deprecated forms of keyBy
  * [[FLINK-18816](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18816>)] - Correct API usage in Pyflink Dependency Management page
  * [[FLINK-18831](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18831>)] - Improve the Python documentation about the operations in Table
  * [[FLINK-18839](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18839>)] - Add documentation about how to use catalog in Python Table API
  * [[FLINK-18847](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18847>)] - Add documentation about data types in Python Table API
  * [[FLINK-18849](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18849>)] - Improve the code tabs of the Flink documents
  * [[FLINK-18881](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18881>)] - Modify the Access Broken Link
  * [[FLINK-19055](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-19055>)] - MemoryManagerSharedResourcesTest contains three tests running extraordinary long
  * [[FLINK-19105](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-19105>)] - Table API Sample Code Error

##  Task

  * [[FLINK-18666](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18666>)] - Update japicmp configuration for 1.11.1
  * [[FLINK-18667](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18667>)] - Data Types documentation misunderstand users
  * [[FLINK-18678](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-18678>)] - Hive connector fails to create vector orc reader if user specifies incorrect hive version
